narration: Declare an integer array named array and initialize it with elements: 1, 45, 16, 100, 0, 5.
Declare an integer variable named n and assign it the value 10 to represent the element to be searched.
Explain that a simple for loop will be used to iterate through the entire array.
Define a for loop with initialization int i = 0, condition i < array.length, and increment i++.
